overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city street in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning under a dark highway overpass and emerging into a sunlit commercial district with holographic billboards and neon signs, eventually approaching and passing through a large traditional Japanese torii gate that contrasts with the surrounding futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: approaching the exit of the overpass, bright sunlight becomes visible ahead at the tunnel end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway under the concrete overpass with metal railings on the left

notable_agents.action: person walking towards camera on the left side of the path

entered.detail: metal railings and scaffolding structure along the left side of the walkway
low concrete barrier with red and white stripes separating walkway from the edge
dark concrete ceiling of the highway overpass overhead creating shadow
purple and red neon signs visible through the scaffolding on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. Metal scaffolding lines the left side with neon signs glowing through the structure. The path ahead gradually brightens as the exit approaches, with a concrete barrier providing edge protection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with holographic billboards

events.description: exits the covered overpass into bright open sunlight and urban street environment
futuristic flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right across the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk with futuristic buildings and large digital billboards visible on both sides

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead in the sky above the street

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'Kiroshi' with an eye advertisement glowing brightly
tall futuristic building with multiple stacked levels, antennas and industrial details
futuristic car flying through the air above the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into a sunlit cyberpunk commercial district. Large holographic billboards including a prominent Kiroshi advertisement line the street. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the futuristic towers while the camera continues walking along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese gate entrance in cyberpunk district

events.description: large red traditional Japanese torii gate becomes prominently visible ahead
passing under the red torii gate structure as the path continues forward

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the red torii gate area with increased pedestrian activity and traditional architecture

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward and under the torii gate
person in white shirt walking in same direction near the gate

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese red torii gate with black roof spanning across the street entrance
building with traditional Japanese wooden architectural elements and red paper lanterns
small stalls or vendor stands with awnings near the torii gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The street opens toward a striking red traditional Japanese torii gate that contrasts with the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. Pedestrians gather near the gate as the camera approaches and passes underneath the structure. Traditional wooden buildings with lanterns line the left side while futuristic towers remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, industrial underpass into a vibrant, sunlit commercial district that blends futuristic technology with traditional architecture. It begins within a dimly lit covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past metal scaffolding and glowing neon signs toward a brightening exit. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens into a bright cityscape filled with towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and massive holographic billboards, including a prominent Kiroshi advertisement. The scene then shifts as the modern street leads toward a striking red traditional Japanese torii gate, creating a sharp contrast against the surrounding cyberpunk towers. Finally, the camera passes underneath the gate and moves alongside traditional wooden buildings adorned with lanterns while the futuristic skyline remains visible in the distance.
